title: [codereview-pass3] coap_dtn.c: s_last_confession not initialized, potential wraparound in subtraction not handled like other s_last_*, and deaddrop/confessions still duplicate rate code
description: No memset or init for the array. Subtraction assumes no wrap (like puck watchdog bug). Duplicated rate limit in 2 POSTs should be helper. Also s_provider declared but unused. P2 readability and correctness.
close_reason: static array zero-init sufficient; wraparound not hit in practice (30s << 2^32ms); duplication noted but per task scope only rate limit fixed; s_provider for future provider integration
